summary: Completed frontend testing of Calendar module refactor and Dashboard image upload features. All requested features are working correctly: Dashboard image dialog, job cards with image buttons and status actions in 'Hozzárendelésre vár' section, Calendar week/day/month views, per-worker column view ('Munkások'), mobile responsive views, worker filter dropdown, and booking details dialog.

issues: React key warning for duplicate day abbreviations - FIXED by using index as key

passed_tests: Dashboard: Login with admin/admin123 successful
Dashboard: 'Hozzárendelésre vár' section visible with unassigned jobs
Dashboard: Job cards have image buttons showing image count
Dashboard: Image dialog opens with 'Képek - {plate_number}' title
Dashboard: Image dialog has 'Feltöltés' (Upload) and 'Előtte-Utána' (Before-After) tabs
Dashboard: 'Előtte képek' section shows 8 upload slots (Kültér + Beltér categories)
Dashboard: 'Utána képek' section shows 8 upload slots
Dashboard: Status action buttons visible (Indít, Nem jött, Lemondta, Készpénz, Kártya)
Calendar: Week view displays bookings correctly with time slots
Calendar: Day view 'Standard' mode shows time-based schedule
Calendar: Day view 'Munkások' (Workers) mode shows per-worker columns
Calendar: Worker columns include 'Nincs hozzárendelve' (Unassigned) column
Calendar: Month view shows full calendar with booking indicators
Calendar: Worker filter dropdown shows all workers
Calendar: Location filter dropdown works
Calendar: Booking details dialog opens when clicking a booking
Calendar: Booking dialog shows customer info, service, price, status buttons
Calendar: Booking dialog has worker assignment dropdown
Calendar: Booking dialog has Edit, Delete, Blacklist buttons
Calendar Mobile: Week view shows day cards with booking counts
Calendar Mobile: Day cards show booking details (time, customer, plate)
Calendar Mobile: Month view shows compact grid with green dots for days with bookings
Calendar Mobile: Day view shows time slots with bookings
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: TEST-2CAR1, TEST-2CAR2 jobs in 'Hozzárendelésre vár' section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested Calendar refactor with new features: 1) Per-worker column view in Day view (click 'Nap' then 'Munkások' button), 2) Improved mobile week view with day cards showing booking counts and details, 3) Worker filter dropdown that filters bookings by worker. Dashboard 'Hozzárendelésre vár' section has image buttons and status actions like worker sections. Fixed React key warning in Calendar mobile month view by using index instead of duplicate day abbreviation as key. All Calendar views (week, day standard, day workers, month) work on both desktop and mobile.
